title: Tip of the week #7: Resize your columns and items!
excerpt:
Customise the width of your board columns by simply clicking and dragging your columns to resize them precisely as you like. A handy feature for highlighting columns that contain important information or a lot of text. 
S…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Customise the width of your board columns by simply clicking and dragging your columns to resize them precisely as you like. A handy feature for highlighting columns that contain important information or a lot of text.

Similarly, if you have an item with a longer name and you don’t want the text to be cut off, you can resize it to display more information. Choose between single, double, or triple item height!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing Amalia
